title: The AI Trap: Why 80% of Companies See No Productivity Gains Despite Massive AI Adoption
excerpt: 70% of companies now use AI, yet over 80% report zero productivity gains. Here's why the AI trap exists and how businesses can escape it.
author: Havlek Team

title: When AI Agents Become Attackers: Why Every Business Needs to Rethink Security in 2026
excerpt: An autonomous AI agent exploited FreeBSD in just four hours. Here's what offensive AI agents mean for business security — and how to prepare your defenses.
author: Havlek Team

title: Google Gemma 4 Goes Fully Open Source: What It Means for Your Business

title: Google's Quantum Encryption Warning: What Every Business Needs to Do Now

title: Big Tech's $635 Billion AI Bet Faces an Energy Reality Check
